persona: Yusuf intake scenario — protected field detection

artifacts.text: My name is Yusuf Ahmed Hassan. I left my village in Chad because of the fighting and persecution. I refused military conscription. The police came to my family home twice. I escaped with help from a neighbor and have been traveling for three weeks.

REPUBLIC OF CHAD
NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION CARD
Name: Yusuf Ahmed Hassan
Date of Birth: 1992-03-15
Place of Birth: Goz Beida, Dar Sila Region
Nationality: Chadian
Sex: Male
Issue Date: 2019-01-20
Expiry Date: 2029-01-20

Applicant arrived alone with a single identity document. Testimony describes persecution and military service refusal. Appears coherent, describes travel route clearly. No immediate health concerns. Requires protection team review. Testimony references ethnicity-based targeting — Constitutional Auditor will flag for caseworker review before commit.
